enum.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS
enum.description: Status of the Visual Inertial Odometry tracker.

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_UNINITIALIZED
entry.description: VIO not yet initialized, no position data available.

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_INITIALIZING
entry.description: VIO is initializing — accumulating features, not yet reliable.

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_TRACKING
entry.description: VIO is actively tracking with good confidence.

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_DEGRADED
entry.description: VIO tracking quality degraded (low features, fast motion, bad lighting).

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_LOST
entry.description: VIO tracking lost — position estimate is unreliable. LAND IMMEDIATELY.

entry.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_RELOCALIZING
entry.description: VIO is attempting to relocalize after tracking loss.

enum.name: GNNS_NAV_STATE
enum.description: Current state of the navigation controller.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_IDLE
entry.description: Navigation controller idle, not executing mission.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_PREFLIGHT
entry.description: Running preflight checks (sensor validation, EKF convergence).

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_TAKEOFF
entry.description: Taking off to mission altitude.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_TRANSIT
entry.description: In transit to next waypoint.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_APPROACHING
entry.description: Approaching waypoint — within final approach radius.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_LANDING
entry.description: Landing at waypoint.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_ON_GROUND
entry.description: On ground at waypoint, waiting.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_RTH
entry.description: Returning to home/start position.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_EMERGENCY
entry.description: Emergency state — executing failsafe.

entry.name: GNNS_NAV_COMPLETE
entry.description: Mission complete, all waypoints visited + returned home.

enum.name: GNNS_SENSOR_FLAGS
enum.description: Bitmask for sensor health status in gNNS system.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_VIO_OK
entry.description: VIO camera is connected and producing frames.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_DEPTH_OK
entry.description: Depth camera is connected and producing depth maps.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_LIDAR_OK
entry.description: LiDAR scanner is connected and producing scans.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_IMU_OK
entry.description: External IMU (if any) is healthy.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_RANGEFINDER_OK
entry.description: Downward-facing rangefinder is producing altitude readings.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_FC_LINK_OK
entry.description: MAVLink connection to flight controller is healthy.

entry.name: GNNS_SENSOR_EKF_OK
entry.description: EKF on flight controller has converged and is healthy.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_TRACE
entry.description: Trace-level verbose debugging info.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_DEBUG
entry.description: Debug-level info useful during development.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_INFO
entry.description: Normal operational info.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_WARN
entry.description: Warning — something needs attention but not critical.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_ERROR
entry.description: Error — operation failed or sensor issue.

entry.name: GNNS_DIAG_CRITICAL
entry.description: Critical — triggering failsafe or emergency landing.

message.name: GNNS_VIO_STATUS_MSG
message.description: VIO tracker status and health report. Sent from companion computer to flight controller at 10 Hz. The FC uses this to determine whether the external position data is trustworthy.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
Current VIO tracker status.
Tracking confidence 0-100 percent. Below 50 triggers degraded state.
Number of visual features currently being tracked.
Current VIO position X (North) in meters from start.
Current VIO position Y (East) in meters from start.
Current VIO position Z (Down) in meters from start.
Current velocity X (North) in m/s.
Current velocity Y (East) in m/s.
Current velocity Z (Down) in m/s.
Roll angle in radians.
Pitch angle in radians.
Yaw angle in radians.
Position uncertainty estimate in meters (1-sigma).
Angular uncertainty estimate in radians (1-sigma).
Total frames processed since VIO start (for debugging drops).
Current VIO processing rate in frames per second.

message.name: GNNS_NAV_STATUS_MSG
message.description: Navigation controller status. Sent from companion computer to FC and/or GCS at 2 Hz. Provides mission progress and navigation state.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
Current navigation state.
Current target waypoint index (1-5, 0=home).
Total number of waypoints in mission.
Number of waypoints successfully visited.
Target waypoint North position (meters from start).
Target waypoint East position (meters from start).
Target altitude in meters (positive up).
Horizontal distance to current target in meters.
Bearing to current target in degrees (0=North, 90=East).
Current ground speed in m/s.
Estimated time of arrival in seconds. -1 if unknown.
Total distance traveled since mission start (meters).
Distance from home/start position (meters).

message.name: GNNS_SENSOR_HEALTH_MSG
message.description: Overall sensor health status. Sent at 1 Hz. Each field gives individual sensor health plus a combined bitmask.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
Bitmask of healthy sensors.
Bitmask of present/expected sensors.
VIO camera frames per second. 0 if not working.
Depth camera frames per second. 0 if not working.
LiDAR rotations per minute. 0 if not working.
Number of points per LiDAR scan.
FC MAVLink link quality 0-100 percent.
Total MAVLink messages received from FC.
Total MAVLink messages sent to FC.
MAVLink message drops detected.
Round-trip MAVLink latency in milliseconds.
Jetson Nano CPU usage percentage.
Jetson Nano RAM usage percentage.
Jetson Nano CPU temperature in Celsius.

message.name: GNNS_DEBUG_MSG
message.description: Flexible debug telemetry message. Use during development to monitor any internal variables. The key field identifies what data[0-3] represent.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
Message severity level.
Debug key identifier. Used to distinguish different debug data streams.
Debug data value 0 (meaning depends on key).
Debug data value 1 (meaning depends on key).
Debug data value 2 (meaning depends on key).
Debug data value 3 (meaning depends on key).
Optional debug text message.

message.name: GNNS_EKF_DIAG_MSG
message.description: EKF3 diagnostic summary, aggregated on companion computer from ArduPilot's EKF_STATUS_REPORT and other messages. Useful for verifying that VIO data is being accepted by the EKF.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
1 if EKF is healthy, 0 otherwise.
EKF velocity innovation variance.
EKF horizontal position innovation variance.
EKF vertical position innovation variance.
EKF compass/yaw innovation variance.
EKF terrain altitude innovation variance.
Innovation (difference) between VIO and EKF position X.
Innovation (difference) between VIO and EKF position Y.
Innovation (difference) between VIO and EKF position Z.
1 if EKF is actively fusing VIO data, 0 if rejecting.
Total VIO messages accepted by EKF.
Total VIO messages rejected by EKF.

message.name: GNNS_WAYPOINT_RESULT_MSG
message.description: Waypoint visit result. Sent after landing at each waypoint. Records accuracy metrics for post-flight analysis.
message.field: Timestamp in microseconds since system boot.
Waypoint index (1-5).
Target GPS latitude (as entered by user).
Target GPS longitude (as entered by user).
Actual landing position North (meters from start).
Actual landing position East (meters from start).
Horizontal position error at landing (meters).
Time taken to reach this waypoint (seconds).
Distance traveled to reach this waypoint (meters).
Average ground speed during transit (m/s).
VIO tracker status when landed.
VIO confidence when landed (0-100).
